teamInvitation.subject: Invitation to join team "{teamName}"
teamInvitation.heading: Team Invitation
teamInvitation.body: {inviterName} has invited you to join the team "{teamName}" as a {role}.
teamInvitation.expiry: Important: This invitation will expire in 7 days.
teamInvitation.ignore: If you did not expect this invitation, you can safely ignore this email.

passwordChanged.subject: Your password was changed
passwordChanged.heading: Password Changed
passwordChanged.body: This is a confirmation that your password has been changed.
passwordChanged.warning: If you did not make this change, please contact support immediately.
